title: Jamaican Beef Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry dish with tender beef and the warmth of Jamaican spices.
instructions: 1. Heat coconut oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Add onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Add curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
5. Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
6. Add chicken broth, browned beef, and scotch bonnet peppers (if using). Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to oven.
7. Braise beef in preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and accompanied by steamed rice or roti.
9. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
